subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! The reply to the letter from the community of Láhá was dispatched... The Qur'án remained confined to the scribes of revelation for twenty-six years. During the time of the Caliphs it was disseminated, though even then it remained limited to but a few copies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس مکتوب جواب نامه جمعیت لاهای ارسال گردید ... قرآن بيست و شش سال در نزد کتّاب وحی محصور بود. در زمان خلفا انتشار يافت و آن نيز محصور در نسخ معدوده بود
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism
